40.1.2.13 - Venipuncture 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

Effective February 5, 1998, venipuncture for the purposes of obtaining a blood sample 
can no longer be the sole reason for Medicare home health eligibility. However, if a 
beneficiary qualifies for home health eligibility based on a skilled need other than solely 
venipuncture (e.g., eligibility based on the skilled nursing
